description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones featuring large, circular ear cups with a wood grain finish on the exterior and black cushioned padding for comfort. The headband is robust, constructed from a metallic or plastic frame with a double-arched design for added support and flexibility. Visible on the ear cups are small control symbols, such as a plus and minus, indicating built-in volume adjustment buttons. The headphones have a sleek, modern aesthetic, blending natural wood textures with matte black and metallic elements. The ear cups are attached to the headband with adjustable hinges, allowing for a customized fit. The overall design suggests a premium audio device suitable for personal listening in urban environments.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with wood-finished ear cups, black cushioned pads, and a sturdy double-arched headband. Integrated volume controls and a modern, premium design are visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular wood-finished ear cup and the attachment point to the headband.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both ear cups, the double-arched headband, and visible volume control buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the other wood-finished ear cup and its connection to the headband.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the depth of the ear cups and the curvature of the headband.
